description_long: This is a medium-to-large, muscular dog with a dense, dark gray to black coat and lighter underbelly. Its body is elongated with a straight back, a bushy tail held low, and strong, well-proportioned legs. The head is broad with a pronounced snout, pricked triangular ears, and alert, forward-facing eyes. The fur appears short to medium in length, with subtle shading and texture variations across the body. No collar or accessories are visible, and the dog stands in a natural, attentive posture. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a wolf-like breed, exuding strength and alertness.
description: A large, muscular dog with a dark gray coat, pricked ears, and a bushy tail held low. Its appearance is wolf-like and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows a broad head, pricked ears, and muscular chest with straight legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, bushy tail, and strong legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical hindquarters and tail hanging straight down.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, body, and tail.
attribute_breed: Wolfdog (wolf-like breed, possibly Alaskan Malamute or German Shepherd mix)
